title: Devil [Horror, Dweller]
description: Adds an another terrifying dweller to your minecraft world.
body:
# **[Community discord can be found here!](https://discord.gg/uhz87fDgBy)**
## Basically, the mod has the same behavior as the Cave Dweller Evolved (Made by: SiverDX), but can spawn on surface in any time and custom model, texture and sounds.... And can break shields and some other stuff that makes him even more terrifying.

The dweller has its own ID. The mod required [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) as a dependency.

**For all the bedrock porters: do not port the mod, plz. If u do > action will be taken > there is no ur channel and stuff ✅. Not giving anyone permissions btw <<<< !!!!!**
